title: Intel Fix
description: fix for graphics corruption on newer intel graphics drivers
body:
fix for graphics corruption on newer intel graphics drivers. this is also fixable by downgrading to drivers released before mid-to-late 2021 but there are some newer chips for which that is not possible.

code adopted from [CoreTweaks][coretweaks] ([code][code]) which is under an MIT license. thanks to everyone who has looked into this issue.

compatible with legacy fabric and ornithe (gen 1 and 2).

[coretweaks]: https://github.com/makamys/CoreTweaks

[code]: https://github.com/makamys/CoreTweaks/tree/master/src/main/java/makamys/coretweaks/mixin/bugfix/intelcolor
